name: Hooked
description: Cast your line into the stunning, turquoise waters of a coral reef in Hooked, a relaxing yet thrilling top-down fishing adventure. As a lone fisherman in a small wooden boat, your goal is to catch as many vibrant goldfish as you can from the shimmering school beneath you. But youre not the only one fishing! Web Dev https://www.crazygamesx.com/
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
